'''bonathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yearbookish|yearbookish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yearbookish|yearbookish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bonathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonathithi|bonathithi]] || [[word:bonathiji|bonathiji]] || [[word:bonathishi|bonathishi]] || [[word:bonathiki|bonathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonathuthuthu|bonathuthuthu]] || [[word:bonathujuju|bonathujuju]] || [[word:bonathushushu|bonathushushu]] || [[word:bonathukuku|bonathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonathuthu|bonathuthu]] || [[word:bonathuju|bonathuju]] || [[word:bonathushu|bonathushu]] || [[word:bonathuku|bonathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonathufthuf|bonathufthuf]] || [[word:bonathufjuf|bonathufjuf]] || [[word:bonathufshuf|bonathufshuf]] || [[word:bonathufkuf|bonathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonathethe|bonathethe]] || [[word:bonatheje|bonatheje]] || [[word:bonatheshe|bonatheshe]] || [[word:bonatheke|bonatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonathothotho|bonathothotho]] || [[word:bonathojojo|bonathojojo]] || [[word:bonathoshosho|bonathoshosho]] || [[word:bonathokoko|bonathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonathotho|bonathotho]] || [[word:bonathojo|bonathojo]] || [[word:bonathosho|bonathosho]] || [[word:bonathoko|bonathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonathofthof|bonathofthof]] || [[word:bonathofjof|bonathofjof]] || [[word:bonathofshof|bonathofshof]] || [[word:bonathofkof|bonathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonathïfthïf|bonathïfthïf]] || [[word:bonathïfjïf|bonathïfjïf]] || [[word:bonathïfshïf|bonathïfshïf]] || [[word:bonathïfkïf|bonathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonathïfthïfthïf|bonathïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:bonathïfjïfjïf|bonathïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:bonathïfshïfshïf|bonathïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:bonathïfkïfkïf|bonathïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonathïfthïf|bonathïfthïf]] || [[word:bonathïfjïf|bonathïfjïf]] || [[word:bonathïfshïf|bonathïfshïf]] || [[word:bonathïfkïf|bonathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonathïfthïf|bonathïfthïf]] || [[word:bonathïfjïf|bonathïfjïf]] || [[word:bonathïfshïf|bonathïfshïf]] || [[word:bonathïfkïf|bonathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonathæthæ|bonathæthæ]] || [[word:bonathæjæ|bonathæjæ]] || [[word:bonathæshæ|bonathæshæ]] || [[word:bonathækæ|bonathækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonathathatha|bonathathatha]] || [[word:bonathajaja|bonathajaja]] || [[word:bonathashasha|bonathashasha]] || [[word:bonathakaka|bonathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonathatha|bonathatha]] || [[word:bonathaja|bonathaja]] || [[word:bonathasha|bonathasha]] || [[word:bonathaka|bonathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonathafthaf|bonathafthaf]] || [[word:bonathafjaf|bonathafjaf]] || [[word:bonathafshaf|bonathafshaf]] || [[word:bonathafkaf|bonathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bonathasha|bonathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bonathshësha|bonathshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bonathrosha|bonathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bonathmusha|bonathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bonathyasha|bonathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobonathnkshësha|gobonathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobonathnkrosha|gobonathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobonathnkmusha|gobonathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobonathnkyasha|gobonathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bonanathasha|bonanathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bonanathshësha|bonanathshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bonanathrosha|bonanathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bonanathmusha|bonanathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bonanathyasha|bonanathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobonanathnkshësha|gobonanathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobonanathnkrosha|gobonanathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobonanathnkmusha|gobonanathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobonanathnkyasha|gobonanathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:benæthasha|benæthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:benæthshësha|benæthshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:benæthrosha|benæthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:benæthmusha|benæthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:benæthyasha|benæthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobenæthnkshësha|gobenæthnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobenæthnkrosha|gobenæthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobenæthnkmusha|gobenæthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobenæthnkyasha|gobenæthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bonfathasha|bonfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bonfathshësha|bonfathshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bonfathrosha|bonfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bonfathmusha|bonfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bonfathyasha|bonfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobonfathnkshësha|gobonfathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobonfathnkrosha|gobonfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobonfathnkmusha|gobonfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobonfathnkyasha|gobonfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
